standards_comparisons.publication: Web Authentication: An API for accessing Public Key Credentials Level 3

findings.title: canonical profile candidate parameters frozen but profile remains unissued
findings.closure: the nonrecursive core and external evidence binding now freeze exact candidate parser, serialization, envelope, digest framing, reference shape, 21 declared domains, and eight version axes for review; remain open until every retained migration finding is resolved or explicitly versioned, current consumers are transitively reissued, independent-host and accountable review evidence exists, and Daniel accepts the exact bytes

findings.title: standalone member and registry snapshot identities incomplete
findings.closure: standalone records and one exact snapshot reference identity pass cross-object validation

findings.title: logical payload identity not bound to exact schema closure
findings.closure: logical type, schema resource, dialect, raw bytes, canonical content, and closure digests are explicit

findings.title: event payload branch identity unchecked
findings.closure: all 60 event members bind exact ResearchEvent bytes and exact payload branch pointer

findings.title: AuthorityGrant issued state unreachable
findings.closure: issue, activate, use, exhaust, expire, and revoke traces pass with known-bad refusals bound to their own guard. ADR 0024 added the two absent required classes: double activation, and use after revocation or expiry. Both guards were confirmed blind before that change: widening grant_activated to accept 'active', and widening grant_used to accept a terminal state, each left the suite green. The state machine was already correct; the defect was evidentiary. Closure additionally requires an independently reproduced verdict, which the producing agent cannot supply for its own change

findings.title: Protocol has no legal first-slice origin
findings.closure: protocol.frozen creates version one from absence without changing the 60-event set. ADR 0025 found this closure condition unevidenced: of twelve protocol_origin guards only three were proved by mutation, and the two carrying this exact claim -- 'protocol origin is not explicitly from aggregate absence' and 'protocol origin does not materialize version 1' -- could be removed with the suite green. ADR 0026 closes that evidence gap: all twelve protocol_origin guards are now proved by mutation, each by a retained known-bad trace breaking exactly one field of the safe reference. The remaining bar is an independently reproduced verdict, which the producing agent cannot supply for its own change CORRECTED 2026-07-18 by measurement: all twelve protocol_origin guards are proved (ADR 0026/0028), and the retained lifecycle-guard-coverage record reports protocol_origin_errors 12/12. This finding no longer carries an evidence blocker; its identity blockers stand.

findings.title: data-use event authority contradicts command profile
findings.closure: bounded data_rights grant use, decision, and exhaustion form one exact atomic cohort. ADR 0025 found this closure condition unevidenced: of eleven data_use_cohort guards only four were proved by mutation, and 'data-use decision must retain exactly one data_rights grant and use event' plus 'data-use grant is not single-use at domain commit' could be removed with the suite green. ADR 0026 closes that evidence gap: all eleven data_use_cohort guards are now proved by mutation, including the exact grant/use-event payload equalities and the single-use-at-domain-commit rule. The remaining bar is an independently reproduced verdict, which the producing agent cannot supply for its own change CORRECTED 2026-07-18 by measurement: all eleven data_use_cohort guards are proved (ADR 0026/0028), and the retained lifecycle-guard-coverage record reports data_use_cohort_errors 11/11. This finding no longer carries an evidence blocker; its identity blockers stand.

findings.title: WorkLease canonical vocabulary diverges
findings.closure: urn:odeya:schema:canonical-work-lease:0.8.0 remains a present_unissued_candidate with the exact unleased|active|released|revoked|expired algebra, and urn:odeya:schema:canonical-work-lease:0.13.0 remains a side-by-side unissued successor binding WorkIntent 0.2 without deleting or redirecting its predecessor; WorkIntent 0.3 now binds exact raw reference targets but has no canonical identity, and no WorkLease successor may bind it until the profile and target canonical identities are admitted; remain unresolved_blocking until an admitted WorkIntent, exact assignment cohort, canonical record/member and reducer identities, accountable review, and activation evidence exist. ADR 0025 added a separate evidence blocker: of eight work_lease_trace guards only two were proved by mutation, and 'WorkLease canonical vocabulary is not the exact five-state sequence' -- the exact algebra this finding turns on, and law 40 of the state model -- could be removed with the suite green. ADR 0026 closes that part: all eight work_lease_trace guards are now proved, including the exact five-state vocabulary and the projection-only status of stale/completed. Twenty-three of twenty-seven work_lease_record_candidate guards remain unproved, so this finding still carries an evidence blocker in addition to its identity blockers CORRECTED 2026-07-18 by measurement: work_lease_record_candidate_errors is 34/34 proved in the retained lifecycle-guard-coverage record (ADR 0028 widened the mutation vocabulary, ADR 0052 and 0066 completed and re-measured it). The evidence blocker this finding carried is closed; the identity blockers -- admitted WorkIntent, exact assignment cohort, canonical record/member and reducer identities, accountable review, activation -- remain, and they terminate in the operator's profile decision.

findings.title: verification assignment requires the lease and reservation it creates
findings.closure: WorkIntent 0.3 and WorkIntentCore 0.2 now replace the three synthetic WorkIntent reference values with exact raw ResearchStateView/PlanningEpoch candidate bindings and the exact retained CandidateArtifact schema digest while preserving all predecessors; raw candidate digests are explicitly not canonical identity, both target canonical digests remain null, and profile issuance, target/member/root admission, assignment, and authority remain absent. C5-WORK-LEASE-RELEASE-CLAIM-001 is corrected in unissued ResearchEvent 0.18.0: retained synthetic fixtures dereference the exact claim and usage references, one partial attempt.start cohort, one complete three-event attempt.report cohort, adjacent retained digest values, and non-fungible per-dimension settlement equations without recomputing event digests or executing a reducer; work.lease_released terminates only WorkLease and later resource.reservation_settled alone performs claimed-to-settled. PRQ-009 remains unresolved_blocking: close or version canonical migration findings, obtain profile acceptance, reissue and admit exact target/member identities, prove the complete 13-event verification assignment cohort, reducer and stream replay, root/activation membership, independent review, and operator acceptance; then derive a post-commit non-dispatch WorkContract and issue exact EventContractRecords.

findings.title: version axes are implicit
findings.closure: the profile core now binds the exact ordered eight-axis vocabulary and rejects implicit equality, conversion, reorder, or upcast; remain open until every legal cross-axis mapping is explicit in all current members and consumers and the complete corpus fails closed on every undeclared conversion

findings.title: constitutional fixtures are not one digest-coherent chain
findings.closure: only a typed blocked receipt may be emitted until replacement core/evidence/seal schemas have new identities, the complete transitive consumer graph is migrated, and every exact dependency exists

findings.title: integrated constitutional equalities are unproved
findings.closure: two non-sharing verifiers reject the complete cross-object mutation corpus

findings.title: declared human principals and valid signatures do not establish a human-controlled decision
findings.closure: the immutable unissued 0.1 resources remain retained beside five separately identified unissued successor schemas, eligibility ruleset 0.2, fourteen content-addressed synthetic backing preimages, a byte-derived backing receipt, three source-separated non-sharing Python, Node.js, and Java recomputation records, a complete six-field comparison receipt, Seal 0.2, forty-four expectation-free vectors, and forty-nine intent-bound downstream chain known-bads; exact local replay produced 132 matching vector recomputations, but this is architecture evidence over synthetic bytes, not organizational independence, a real ceremony, a human decision, approval, or authority; the context-isolated technical-review report refuted the exact published predecessor phase-two relation, and the corrected exact scope retained no_grounded_refutation_observed_within_declared_round_eleven_attacks; that report is correlated non-accountable model-worker evidence, not a ReviewDetermination, organizationally independent review, accountable security or authority review, or Gate A acceptance, and HDA-CTX-001 through HDA-CTX-016 remain changed_candidate_pending_accountable_closure_review; the authentication challenge commits to the confirmation-receipt digest, so same-actor confirmation/authenticator cryptographic co-binding is true strictly as a synthetic construction property while no real ceremony measured that one natural person performed both acts; this remains only the T0 individual-assurance foundation candidate: zero current consumers are migrated, no admitted assurance record or assured-decision wrapper identity is issued, and no end-to-end consumer refusal, accountable security and authority review, or operator acceptance exists; remain unresolved_blocking until T1 AuthorityAssignment and the required T2 command, event, state, reducer, currentness, quorum, and consumer dependencies exist, separately identified unissued AssuredDecision and successor-consumer candidates are constructed, exact transitive migration without mutating retained identities and end-to-end refusal are proved, HDA-CTX-001 through HDA-CTX-016 receive accountable closure review, and accountable review plus Daniel's exact-byte Gate A decision governs issuance and admission; Gate A neither requires nor authorizes a live protected ceremony, one real protected ceremony is a separately authorized bounded Gate B probe, and runtime conformance remains a Gate C exit condition; unattended agent-accessible keys, declared human types, signatures, timeout, silence, or prose-only caveats never satisfy a human-only decision
